            <![CDATA[
const shell = require('shelljs');

function escapeShellArg(str) {
    // Escape string for safe use as a bash command argument
    return `'${str.replace(/'/g, "'\\''")}'`;
}

/**
 * Extract the most recent N error logs from the specified log file and sort them by timestamp
 * @param {string} logFilePath - Path to the log file
 * @param {number} entryCount - Number of log entries to extract
 * @returns {Array} An array containing error logs, sorted by timestamp (newest first)
 */
function extractRecentErrors(logFilePath, entryCount) {
    // Validate input parameters
    if (typeof logFilePath !== 'string' || logFilePath.trim() === '') {
        throw new Error('logFilePath must be a non-empty string');
    }
    if (typeof entryCount !== 'number' || !Number.isInteger(entryCount) || entryCount <= 0) {
        throw new Error('entryCount must be a positive integer');
    }

    // Build safe bash command
    const safeLogPath = escapeShellArg(logFilePath);
    const tailCount = Math.max(entryCount, 100); // Ensure we get enough recent logs
    const command = `grep 'ERROR' ${safeLogPath} | tail -n ${tailCount} | sort | tail -n ${entryCount}`;

    // Execute command silently
    const result = shell.exec(command, { silent: true });

    // Handle command execution errors
    if (result.code !== 0) {
        const errorMessage = result.stderr || 'Unknown error occurred';
        throw new Error(`Command execution failed: ${errorMessage}`);
    }

    // Process output
    const output = result.stdout.trim();
    if (!output) {
        return [];
